# tfe_outputs

This data source can be used to retrieve a workspace's state outputs.

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `workspace` (String) Name of the workspace.

### Optional

- `organization` (String) Name of the organization.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) System-generated unique identifier for the resource.
- `nonsensitive_values` (Dynamic) Non-sensitive values of the workspace outputs.
- `values` (Dynamic, Sensitive) Values of the workspace outputs.
